title: Introduction
text: Industrial-underground Vue 3 design system

title: Installation
text: Install plugin named imports styles package

title: Tokens
text: CSS variables colors spacing typography customization

title: Components
text: All component categories and public APIs

title: SSR & Nuxt
text: Server rendering hydration Nuxt imports teleports

title: Customization
text: Token overrides stable classes dark theme

title: Accessibility
text: Keyboard screen reader checklist best effort axe

title: KvProvider
text: Foundations Establishes tokens, typography, grain, and a local override boundary. tokens Record<string, string> grain boolean

title: KvContainer
text: Foundations Constrains page content to a readable responsive measure. size 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'full'

title: KvStack
text: Foundations Arranges children vertically with tokenized spacing. gap 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl'

title: KvCluster
text: Foundations Wraps related controls and content on a horizontal axis. justify 'start' | 'center' | 'end' | 'between'

title: KvGrid
text: Foundations Creates an auto-fitting responsive grid without breakpoint props. min string

title: KvDivider
text: Foundations Separates regions visually and semantically. orientation 'horizontal' | 'vertical'

title: KvVisuallyHidden
text: Foundations Keeps accessible text available without visual layout. focusable boolean

title: KvHeading
text: Foundations Industrial condensed display heading with valid semantic levels. level 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 eyebrow string

title: KvText
text: Foundations Body copy with size and tone controls. tone 'default' | 'muted' | 'signal'

title: KvLink
text: Foundations A high-contrast text link with external-link safety. href string external boolean

title: KvCode
text: Foundations Inline or block monospace technical content. block boolean

title: KvButton
text: Actions Primary action with variants, sizes, loading, and slot affordances. size KvSize variant KvVariant loading boolean Enter / Space — activate

title: KvIconButton
text: Actions Square icon-only action that requires an accessible label. label string size KvSize Enter / Space — activate

title: KvButtonGroup
text: Actions Labels and groups related actions. label string attached boolean

title: KvField
text: Forms Connects label, description, error, required state, and input IDs automatically. label string description string error string

title: KvInput
text: Forms Textual and native date/time input types with controlled or default state. modelValue varies size KvSize type text | email | password | search | number | date | time | datetime-local | …

title: KvTextarea
text: Forms Multiline text entry with consumer-controlled validation. modelValue varies rows number

title: KvSelect
text: Forms Styled semantic native select retaining platform keyboard behavior. modelValue varies options KvSelectOption[] Arrow keys — move Home / End — first or last Enter — commit on supported platforms

title: KvCombobox
text: Forms Filterable listbox with complete active-option keyboard handling. modelValue varies options KvComboboxOption[] Arrow Up / Down — move Home / End — first or last Enter — select Escape — close

title: KvCheckbox
text: Forms Boolean or indeterminate choice with label and description. modelValue varies indeterminate boolean Space — toggle

title: KvRadioGroup
text: Forms Named native radio set in a semantic fieldset. modelValue varies options KvSelectOption[] Arrow keys — move and select Space — select

title: KvSwitch
text: Forms Immediate boolean setting using the switch role. modelValue varies label string Space / Enter — toggle

title: KvSlider
text: Forms Native range control with signal progress and optional value output. modelValue varies min / max / step number Arrow keys — adjust one step Page Up / Down — larger adjustment Home / End — limits

title: KvFileInput
text: Forms Styled native file picker that emits a stable File array. accept string multiple boolean Enter / Space — open system picker

title: KvTabs
text: Navigation Automatic-activation tab set with horizontal or vertical orientation. modelValue varies items KvTabItem[] Arrow keys — select adjacent tab Home / End — first or last tab

title: KvBreadcrumbs
text: Navigation Semantic path navigation with a current-page marker. items KvBreadcrumbItem[]

title: KvPagination
text: Navigation Controlled or default pagination with bounded page updates. modelValue varies total number pageSize number

title: KvSteps
text: Navigation Read-only ordered process indicator. items KvStep[] current number | string

title: KvDropdownMenu
text: Navigation Positioned action menu with roving focus and outside handling. open boolean items KvMenuItem[] placement KvPlacement Arrow Up / Down — move Home / End — first or last Enter / Space — invoke Escape — close and restore focus

title: KvDialog
text: Overlays Modal surface with focus trap, restoration, Escape, outside handling, and scroll lock. open boolean title string closeOnOutside boolean Tab / Shift+Tab — cycle inside Escape — close and restore focus

title: KvAlertDialog
text: Overlays Interruptive confirmation surface with initial cancel focus. open boolean destructive boolean Tab / Shift+Tab — cycle inside Escape — cancel and restore focus

title: KvDrawer
text: Overlays Edge-mounted modal panel sharing the dialog focus contract. open boolean side 'left' | 'right' Tab / Shift+Tab — cycle inside Escape — close and restore focus

title: KvPopover
text: Overlays Non-modal positioned content with flip, shift, outside, and Escape handling. open boolean placement KvPlacement Escape — close and restore focus

title: KvTooltip
text: Overlays Delayed hover/focus description rendered through a safe teleport. text string delay number Focus — show Escape / Blur — hide

title: KvCard
text: Data & Disclosure Steel surface for grouped, optionally interactive content. padding 'none' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'

title: KvAccordion
text: Data & Disclosure Single or multi-open disclosure regions using semantic heading buttons. modelValue varies items KvAccordionItem[] multiple boolean Enter / Space — toggle panel

title: KvTable
text: Data & Disclosure Semantic typed table with controlled sorting and row selection; data transforms stay consumer-owned. items T[] columns KvTableColumn<T>[] rowKey keyof T | (item: T) => string | number sort KvSortState selectedKeys (string | number)[] Enter / Space — sort header or toggle checkbox

title: KvAlert
text: Feedback Inline neutral or status message with optional dismissal. status KvStatus

title: KvBadge
text: Feedback Compact status or metadata label. status KvStatus dot boolean

title: KvProgress
text: Feedback Determinate or indeterminate progress with an accessible label. value number | undefined max number

title: KvSpinner
text: Feedback Compact mechanical loading indicator with status text. label string size KvSize

title: KvSkeleton
text: Feedback Non-semantic placeholder for nearby loading state. width / height string

title: KvEmptyState
text: Feedback Centered no-content state with icon and action slots. title string description string

title: KvToastProvider
text: Feedback Provides useKvToast and renders timed, actionable status notifications. placement 'top-right' | 'top-left' | 'bottom-right' | 'bottom-left' defaultDuration number Tab — reach actions when present Enter / Space — invoke or dismiss
